zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert Standish於大約1485年出生在英國藍卡爾奧姆斯吉可時，他的父親Sir Alexander Standish34歲，母親Sibyl Bold46歲。他於大約1502年與Margaret Croft結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1556年在曼島素爾比享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert Standish于大约1485年出生在英国藍卡爾奧姆斯吉可时，他的父亲Sir Alexander Standish34岁，母亲Sibyl Bold46岁。他于大约1502年与Margaret Croft结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1556年在曼岛素爾比享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: Standish
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name from Standish (Lancashire, now part of Greater Manchester), from Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + edisc ‘enclosure, enclosed park’. Standish (Gloucestershire) does not appear to have contributed towards the surname.

History: Myles Standish (c. 1584–1656) was a soldier of fortune, from 1620 captain of the Mayflower Pilgrims at Plymouth Colony. Little is known of his origins and early life, but in his will he claimed to be descended from a leading Catholic family, the Standishes of Standish, Lancashire, England. He also claimed to have been deprived of his inheritance, a claim not confirmed.

variants.name: Standage
meanings: in Leicestershire and Buckinghamshire, the name may alternatively be from Stanedge Grange in Hartington Nether Quarter or Stanage End in Outseats (both Derbyshire); but evidence is needed for this. The placenames derive from Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + ecg ‘edge, escarpment’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.description: Title King of Man waived for Lord of Mann.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Standish was born about 1485, in Ormskirk, Lancashire, England, his father, Sir Alexander Standish, was 34 and his mother, Sibyl Bold, was 46. He married Margaret Croft about 1502. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1556, in Sulby, Isle of Man, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert Standish est né environ 1485, à Ormskirk, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Alexander Standish, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Sibyl Bold, avait 46 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Croft environ 1502. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1556, à Sulby, Île de Man, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert Standish um 1485 in Ormskirk, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Alexander Standish 34 und seine Mutter Sibyl Bold 46. Er hat um 1502 Margaret Croft geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1556 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Sulby, Isle of Man.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Standish è nato il circa 1485 nel Ormskirk, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Sir Alexander Standish, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Sibyl Bold, aveva 46 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Croft circa 1502. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1556, nel Sulby, Isola di Man, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Standishが約1485年にイギリスランカシュアイアオルムスキルクで生まれた時，父Sir Alexander Standishは34歳，母Sibyl Boldは46歳であった。約1502年にMargaret Croftと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1556年にマン島スルビーで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Standish(이)가 대략 1485년 영국 랭카실르 오스커크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Alexander Standish(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Sibyl Bold(은)는 46세였다. 그는 대략 1502년 Margaret Croft(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1556년 맨섬 설비에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Standish nasceu aproximadamente 1485, em Ormskirk, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Alexander Standish, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Sibyl Bold, tinha 46 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Croft aproximadamente 1502. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1556, em Sulby, Ilha de Man, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert Standish родился около 1485 г. в местности ормскирк, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Alexander Standish было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Sibyl Bold, 46. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Croft около 1502 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1556 г. в местности сулби, Остров Мэн в возрасте 72 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert Standish nació aproximadamente 1485, en Ormskirk, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Alexander Standish, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Sibyl Bold, tenía 46 años. Se casó con Margaret Croft aproximadamente 1502. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1556, en Sulby, Isla de Man, a la edad de 72 años.
